overview: Example PRD for testing SPIRAL. Replace with your own project requirements.
goals: Demonstrate SPIRAL workflow with minimal stories
Test research, merge, and implementation phases

userStories.title: Create hello world endpoint
userStories.description: Create a simple HTTP endpoint that returns a greeting message. This is the entry point for the application.
technicalNotes: Create server.js or app.py in project root
Use the simplest framework available (Express, Flask, etc.)

userStories.title: Add personalized greeting parameter
userStories.description: Extend the hello endpoint to accept an optional name parameter for personalized greetings.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /hello without name still returns { "message": "Hello, World!" }
Name parameter is sanitized (no HTML/script injection)
technicalNotes: Add query parameter parsing to the existing endpoint
Sanitize the name input to prevent XSS

userStories.title: Add health check endpoint
userStories.description: Add a /health endpoint that returns server status. Already implemented as an example of a completed story.
technicalNotes: Simple status endpoint, no external dependencies
